title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: nftables bug fix update

full_text:
An update for nftables is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

nftables provides a packet-filtering tool, with numerous improvements in convenience, features, and performance. It is the designated successor to iptables, ip6tables, arptables and ebtables.Bug Fix(es): Fix for resource leaks in JSON parser error path [rhel-9] (JIRA:RHEL-88181)
